title: Stock Market Today, Mar. 4: U.S. and European stocks rise despite Asia market meltdown
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose despite a significant downturn in Asian markets. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 both saw gains, while Asian markets face
excerpt: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose despite a significant downturn in Asian markets. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 both saw gains, while Asian markets faced severe declines due to regional tensions.

content.introduction: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose despite a significant downturn in Asian markets. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 both saw gains, while Asian markets faced severe declines due to regional tensions.
